search_queries_used: site:dha.gov.ae abnormal uterine bleeding clinical guideline Dubai
site:doh.gov.ae abnormal uterine bleeding guideline Abu Dhabi
site:nice.org.uk heavy menstrual bleeding NG88 recommendations
rejection_reasons: The DHA guideline is pain-focused and not an abnormal-bleeding assessment source.
The DoH source is limited to assisted reproduction.
NICE CG44 is explicitly superseded by NG88.
population_applicability: Partial: exact source focuses heavy menstrual bleeding, with selected persistent intermenstrual and irregular bleeding contexts; the baseline covers broader abnormal bleeding.
setting_applicability: Partial: source covers England primary and secondary care; the baseline is setting-agnostic.
UAE_applicability: No direct UAE applicability is established; current UAE official guideline pages were searched and this international source requires UAE clinician review.
recency_verification: Current official NICE NG88 recommendations opened on 2026-07-11; last updated 2021-05-24 and last reviewed 2024-12-19.
superseded_check: NG88 is current and explicitly replaces CG44.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Directly supports mapped bleeding nature, intermenstrual bleeding, pain, cycle, clot, impact, and examination-context documentation in the HMB population.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Specifies bleeding nature, persistent intermenstrual bleeding, pelvic pain or pressure, quality-of-life impact, comorbidities, prior treatment, and examination context.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Directly supports mapped CBC, indication-limited coagulation, and indication-limited thyroid-test documentation.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Requires full blood count, limits coagulation testing to relevant history, and states that ferritin, hormone, and thyroid testing are not routine without specific indications.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Directly supports mapped persistent irregular or intermenstrual bleeding context and clinician-selected pelvic ultrasound or investigation follow-up.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Links history and examination to ultrasound or hysteroscopy selection and identifies persistent intermenstrual or irregular bleeding among endometrial-pathology risk contexts.

unresolved_source_gaps: The source does not primarily cover postcoital bleeding, all irregular cycles, pregnancy-related bleeding, acute instability, or every abnormal-uterine-bleeding cause.
No exact UAE abnormal-uterine-bleeding guideline was identified.
Pregnancy testing, ferritin review, treatment, medication, and fixed follow-up content remain unsupported by this mapping.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
